title: ALO — Stress Analysis
description: Stress analysis by application, target, operation, and template, with overall trend.

panels.title: ES CPU Usage
panels.description: Elasticsearch process CPU %. Requires prometheus profile.

panels.title: Total Stress Score
panels.description: Sum of all stress scores in the selected time period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS t, sum(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Dashboard Guide
panels.description: Quick reference guide for examining this dashboard.

options.content:
## Dashboard Cheat Sheet

**How to examine this dashboard:**

1. **Start with the overview** — pie charts show which application, target, operation, or template contributes the most stress.
2. **Review the Top 10 Templates table** — focus on templates with the highest sum stress and cost indicator counts.
3. **Look at trends** — stress over time charts reveal spikes and patterns. Correlate with deployments or traffic changes.
4. **Review volume & throughput** — request volume, total hits, docs affected, and request size panels show operational load. Total hits correlates with CPU.
5. **Examine response times** — high ES or gateway latency alongside high stress may indicate query optimization opportunities.
6. **Sanity checks** — verify if the most recurring templates are also the most stressful; templates with many cost indicators need attention.

**What to focus on:**
- **High stress slices** in pie charts — click to filter the dashboard
- **Upward trends** in time series — growing load or degrading patterns
- **Templates with many cost indicators** — query optimization candidates
- **Latency spikes** correlating with specific operations or templates

**Filtering by custom labels:**
If your requests include `x-alo-*` headers (e.g., `x-alo-team: payments`), filter by them using the **Filters** bar at the top: click `+`, type `identity.labels.team`, set `= payments`.

panels.title: Stress by Application (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across applicative providers. Click a slice to filter the dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT identity_applicative_provider AS label, sum(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress by Target (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across target indices. Click a slice to filter the dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_target AS label, sum(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress by Operation (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across operation types (search, index, bulk, etc.). Click a slice to filter.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_operation AS label, sum(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress by Cost Indicator (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across cost indicator types. 'unflagged' = requests with no cost indicators.

targets.rawSql: SELECT arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) AS label, sum(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Stress by Template (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across request templates. Click a slice to filter the dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS label, sum(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Templates by Stress Score
panels.description: Top 10 request templates ranked by total stress score, with latency percentiles and cost-indicator averages.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", sum(stress_score) AS "Sum Stress Score", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Stress Score", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)", avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS "Avg Cost Indicators", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Sum Stress Score" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Heaviest Operations
panels.description: Individual requests with the highest stress scores in the selected time range. Click column headers to re-sort.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS "Time", request_body AS "Request Body", request_operation AS "Operation", request_target AS "Target", request_path AS "Path", stress_score AS "Stress", response_es_took_ms AS "ES Latency (ms)", stress_cost_indicator_names AS "Cost Indicators" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) ORDER BY stress_score DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top 10 Cost Indicators by Stress Score
panels.description: Cost indicator types ranked by total stress contribution, with latency percentiles.

targets.rawSql: SELECT arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) AS "Cost Indicator", sum(stress_score) AS "Sum Stress", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Stress", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY "Cost Indicator" ORDER BY "Sum Stress" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Stress by Application
panels.description: Average stress score over time, broken down by applicative provider.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND identity_applicative_provider IN (    SELECT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY identity_applicative_provider ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Target
panels.description: Average stress score over time, broken down by target index.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_target AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_target IN (    SELECT request_target FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_target ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Operation
panels.description: Average stress score over time, broken down by operation type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Cost Indicator
panels.description: Average stress score over time, broken down by cost indicator.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) IN (    SELECT arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Template
panels.description: Average stress score over time, broken down by request template.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Request Volume
panels.description: Total request count over time. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Documents Matched by Queries
panels.description: Total documents matched by queries. Correlates with ES CPU under queue saturation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, sum(response_hits) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Write Volume (Documents)
panels.description: Total documents written (index / bulk / update).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, sum(response_docs_affected) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Request Size
panels.description: Total inbound request payload size.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, sum(request_size_bytes) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: ES Latency
panels.description: Elasticsearch response-time trend with Avg / P50 / P95 / P99 — rising P95/P99 signals tail-latency issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
